```erlang
solve(Nums) ->
    Sorted = lists:sort(Nums),
    case Nums =:= Sorted of
        true -> 0;
        false ->
            MaxK = find_max_k(Nums, Sorted, 0),
            MaxK
    end.

find_max_k(Nums, Sorted, K) ->
    case can_sort(Nums, Sorted, K) of
        true -> 
            case can_sort(Nums, Sorted, K + 1) of
                true -> find_max_k(Nums, Sorted, K + 1);
                false -> K
            end;
        false -> find_max_k(Nums, Sorted, K - 1)
    end.

    Groups = group_by_connected_components(Nums, K),
    lists:all(fun(Group) -> 
                  lists:sort(Group) =:= lists:sort([lists:nth(I + 1, Sorted) || I <- Group])
              end, Groups).

group_by_connected_components(Nums, K) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    Visited = array:new([{size, N}, {default, false}]),
    Groups = [],
    group_by_connected_components(0, N, Nums, K, Visited, Groups).

    Groups;
group_by_connected_components(I, N, Nums, K, Visited, Groups) ->
    case array:get(I, Visited) of
        true ->
            group_by_connected_components(I + 1, N, Nums, K, Visited, Groups);
        false ->
            Group = dfs(I, Nums, K, Visited, []),
            NewGroups = [Group | Groups],
            group_by_connected_components(I + 1, N, Nums, K, Visited, NewGroups)
    end.

dfs(I, Nums, K, Visited, Group) ->
    case array:get(I, Visited) of
        true ->
            Group;
        false ->
            NewVisited = array:set(I, true, Visited),
            NewGroup = [I | Group],
            lists:foldl(fun(J, AccGroup) ->
                          case (lists:nth(I + 1, Nums) band lists:nth(J + 1, Nums)) =:= K of
                              true -> dfs(J, Nums, K, NewVisited, AccGroup);
                              false -> AccGroup
                          end
                      end, NewGroup, lists:seq(0, length(Nums) - 1))
    end.
```
